name: project-lens
description: Per-feature codebase documentation. Uses a cheap OpenRouter LLM to scan your project and generate structured feature docs. Injects relevant context before every file edit so Claude never skims unknown code.

openrouter_key.description: Your OpenRouter API key (get one at openrouter.ai). Used to run cheap LLM scans on your codebase.

model.description: OpenRouter model to use for scanning (default: deepseek/deepseek-chat). Cheap options: google/gemma-3-27b-it:free, deepseek/deepseek-chat
